title: polygala jamesii
intro: Polygala jamesii, also known as James' polygala or James' dragon's blood, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It belongs to the Polygalaceae family and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Polygala jamesii is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically for skin issues like wounds and eczema.
